html:
Exclusive to:

The Toy Trojan Horse references the Trojan horse that was used in the Trojan War as a sneaky way to pass the walls of Troy and end the war.

When given to the Antlion as tribute, this trinket delays its rage by 0.66 days.

The Toy Trojan Horse can be spawned into the game with the code "trinket_18".

×6

Exclusive to:
“I wonder what it's hiding?”
–Wilson
“I bet the Viking would be into this.”
–Willow
“Wheeled horsey!”
–Wolfgang
“It conceals tragedy.”
–Wendy
“SOMETHING'S JINGLING AROUND INSIDE”
–WX-78
“Beware of Greeks bearing gifts.”
–Wickerbottom
“I would have liked this when I was a boy.”
–Woodie
“A metaphor, perhaps.”
–Maxwell
“I must mentör the yöung öne in battle strategy.”
–Wigfrid
“We like toys.”
–Webber
“What could be inside?”
–Warly
“Wheee!”
–Wormwood
“Handcrafted. Blech.”
–Winona
“Tiny little pranksters surely wait inside. Surprise!”
–Wortox
“Something rattling inside.”
–Wurt
“Seems like a normal wooden horse.”
–Walter
“Has history taught us nothing?”
–Wanda
The Toy Trojan Horse references the Trojan horse that was used in the Trojan War as a sneaky way to pass the walls of Troy and end the war.
When given to the Antlion as tribute, this trinket delays its rage by 0.66 days.
The Toy Trojan Horse can be spawned into the game with the code "trinket_18".
